manufacturing_process: Stamped reinforcement welded into front body assembly
primary_function: Distribute suspension loads into the upper body structure
interfaces: Shock tower, apron panel, upper rail, cowl side reinforcement
load_cases: Road durability, pothole impact, cornering loads, body torsion
environmental_exposure: Wheelhouse splash, stone impact, corrosion exposure
known_design_concerns: Fatigue, spot weld fatigue, corrosion, dimensional variation, stiffness, forming thinning
assumptions: Synthetic demo data only. Final values require engineering review.
